name: 1. Navigate to Pricing
goal: Navigate to the pricing page. Once you reach /pricing, you are done.

name: 2. Navigate to About
goal: Navigate to the about page. Once you reach /about, you are done.

name: 3. Navigate to Downloads
goal: Navigate to the download page. Once there, you are done.

name: 4. Navigate to Integrations
goal: Navigate to the integrations page. Once you reach /integrations, you are done.

name: 5. Navigate to Docs
goal: Navigate to the documentation page. Once you reach /docs, you are done.

name: 6. Find Time Tracking Feature
goal: Navigate to the time tracking feature page. Once you reach /time-tracking, you are done.

name: 7. Find Invoicing Feature
goal: Navigate to the invoicing feature page. Once you reach /invoicing, you are done.

name: 8. Find File Storage Feature
goal: Navigate to the file storage feature page. Once you reach /file-storage, you are done.

name: 9. Navigate to Inbox
goal: Navigate to the inbox feature page. Once you reach /inbox, you are done.

name: 10. Navigate to Insights
goal: Navigate to the financial insights page. Once you reach /insights, you are done.

name: 11. Navigate to Transactions
goal: Navigate to the transactions feature page. Once you reach /transactions, you are done.

name: 12. Navigate to MCP Hub
goal: Navigate to the MCP (Model Context Protocol) page. Once you reach /mcp, you are done.

name: 13. Find MCP for Claude
goal: Navigate to the MCP integration page for Claude. Once you reach /mcp/claude, you are done.

name: 14. Find MCP for Cursor
goal: Navigate to the MCP integration page for Cursor. Once you reach /mcp/cursor, you are done.

name: 15. Find MCP for ChatGPT
goal: Navigate to the MCP integration page for ChatGPT. Once you reach /mcp/chatgpt, you are done.

name: 16. Navigate to AI Agents
goal: Navigate to the AI agents page. Once you reach /agents, you are done.

name: 17. Navigate to AI Assistant
goal: Navigate to the AI assistant feature page. Once you reach /assistant, you are done.

name: 18. Navigate to Customers
goal: Navigate to the customers page. Once you reach /customers, you are done.

name: 19. Navigate to Updates/Blog
goal: Navigate to the updates/blog page. Once you reach /updates, you are done.

name: 20. Find Privacy Policy
goal: Navigate to the privacy policy page. Once you reach /policy, you are done.

name: 21. Find Terms of Service
goal: Navigate to the terms of service page. Once you reach /terms, you are done.

name: 22. Navigate to SDKs
goal: Navigate to the SDKs page. Once you reach /sdks, you are done.

name: 23. Navigate to Support
goal: Navigate to the support page. Once you reach /support, you are done.

name: 24. Navigate to Testimonials
goal: Navigate to the testimonials page. Once you reach /testimonials, you are done.

name: 25. Find Pre-Accounting Feature
goal: Navigate to the pre-accounting feature page. Once you reach /pre-accounting, you are done.

name: 26. Navigate to Bank Coverage
goal: Navigate to the bank coverage page. Once you reach /bank-coverage, you are done.

name: 27. Navigate to Company Story
goal: Navigate to the company story page. Once you reach /story, you are done.

name: 28. Find Compare Page
goal: Navigate to the comparison page where Midday is compared with alternatives. Once you reach /compare, you are done.

name: 29. Navigate from Pricing to Invoicing
goal: Starting from the pricing page, navigate to the invoicing feature page. Once you reach /invoicing, you are done.

name: 30. Navigate from About to Pricing
goal: Starting from the about page, navigate to the pricing page. Once you reach /pricing, you are done.

name: 31. Deep Nav: MCP Zapier from Homepage
goal: Navigate to the MCP integration page for Zapier. Once you reach /mcp/zapier, you are done.

name: 32. Deep Nav: MCP Windsurf from Homepage
goal: Navigate to the MCP integration page for Windsurf. Once you reach /mcp/windsurf, you are done.

name: 33. Cross-feature: Inbox to Time Tracking
goal: Starting from the inbox page, navigate to the time tracking page. Once you reach /time-tracking, you are done.

name: 34. Cross-feature: Transactions to File Storage
goal: Starting from the transactions page, navigate to the file storage page. Once you reach /file-storage, you are done.

name: 35. Navigate to MCP Gemini from MCP Hub
goal: Starting from the MCP page, navigate to the Gemini MCP integration page. Once you reach /mcp/gemini, you are done.

name: 36. Navigate to Login (Auth Check)
goal: Navigate to the login/sign-in page. If you are redirected to an external auth provider, report it and mark done.
